name: reva-introduction
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman with silver-streaked hair, expression shifted from evaluation to recognition. Introducing herself now — the dynamic changed. Sovereignty uniform crisp, Commandant insignia visible. Cool blue-white lighting from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Reva Orin. Strategic Command. Your file was flagged before you boarded.

name: reva-assessment
prompt: Close-up. Older woman's face, tilting head slightly. Sharp features, evaluating but with new respect. Silver streaks in dark hair. Expression precise, calculating value. Cool blue light from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Not for the synergy — for leaving it. You walked away from Paragon-tier output because he wouldn't cross over.

name: conviction-or-tragedy
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Older woman delivering assessment. Eyes steady, direct. Silver-streaked dark hair framing sharp features. Expression knowing. Cool blue light casting dramatic shadows. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: probably-both
prompt: Medium shot. Young brunette woman, meeting Reva's eyes now. Expression guarded but honest. A flicker of dark humor. Cool blue-white transport lighting from above and viewport beside her. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
